articles.title: Barrick Mining (TSX:ABX) Introduces Cash Flow Linked Dividend And Plans Asset IPO
articles.summary: Barrick Mining (TSX:ABX) has introduced a performance linked dividend framework tied to cash flow. The company has also outlined plans for an IPO of selected North American assets. These moves adjust Barrick Mining's approach to shareholder returns and its regional asset mix. The new dividend framework and planned North American asset IPO come as Barrick Mining trades at CA$52.33 and has delivered an 88.8% return over the past year. articles.title: Is Barrick Mining (TSX:ABX) Fully Priced, Or Still A Bargain?
articles.summary: Barrick Mining stock has delivered a strong 153.6% return over the past three years, yet current checks suggest it now looks closer to fairly valued on a Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) basis, while earnings-based multiples still lean toward the shares looking inexpensive. A 153.6% three-year return highlights how much value the market has already recognised, which naturally raises the bar for any further upside.
